import json, re, unicodedata, os, textwrap, itertools

path_h = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
path_q = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

hadith_db = load_json(path_h)
quran_db = load_json(path_q)

len(hadith_db), len(quran_db)[:1] if isinstance(quran_db, list) else type(quran_db)
len(hadith_db), (len(quran_db) if isinstance(quran_db, list) else str(type(quran_db)))

# define normalization function
def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None: return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify alif/hamza/ya/ta marbuta
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ة','ه')
    # punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

query = "لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ شُرَّعَتكَ"
norm_query = normalize_ar(query)
norm_query

# approximate search using tokens overlap for "لا تزوجن" and "شرعتك"
tokens = set(norm_query.split())
cands = []
for i,rec in enumerate(hadith_db):
    txt = extract_text(rec)
    n = normalize_ar(txt)
    score = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in n)
    if score>=2:
        cands.append((score, i, txt[:200]))
len(cands)

# Show top candidates
for score,i,txt in sorted(cands, reverse=True)[:10]:
    print(score, i, normalize_ar(txt)[:120])
    print(txt[:200],"\n----")

q = normalize_ar("لا تزوجن")
cands2=[]
for i,rec in enumerate(hadith_db):
    txt = extract_text(rec)
    n=normalize_ar(txt)
    if q in n:
        cands2.append((i, txt))
len(cands2)
